# Time Format Requirements Review Checklist: Time Format Toggle

**Purpose**: Validate requirement quality for epoch milliseconds display, timer continuity, input logging timestamp preservation, compact overlay UI, and test-readiness before implementation
**Created**: 2026-07-01
**Feature**: [spec.md](../spec.md)

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit.checklist` command based on feature context and requirements. It validates the written requirements, not the implementation.

## Requirement Completeness

- [x] CHK001 Are both display formats explicitly defined for Clock mode and Timer mode, including exact width and separator rules? [Completeness, Spec §FR-001, §FR-005, §FR-006]
- [x] CHK002 Are all affected surfaces listed for the selected format: Clock, Timer, latest Loop, visible input rows, and appended log lines? [Completeness, Spec §FR-002]
- [x] CHK003 Are persistence requirements for the selected time format documented, including fallback for missing or invalid stored values? [Completeness, Spec §FR-004, §FR-014]
- [x] CHK004 Are immutable history requirements documented for old visible input rows, preserved rows, and existing log lines? [Completeness, Spec §FR-010, §FR-011, §FR-012]
- [x] CHK005 Are toolbar placement requirements documented for both Clock and Timer modes, including expanded logging state? [Completeness, Spec §FR-015, UI Contract §Toolbar Placement]
- [x] CHK006 Are automated test coverage expectations documented for all user stories and affected domains? [Completeness, Spec §FR-021, Plan §Phase 2 Planning Notes]

## Requirement Clarity

- [x] CHK007 Is "epoch milliseconds" defined as 13 decimal digits with no decimal separator wherever the alternate format is described? [Clarity, Spec §Clarifications, Spec §FR-005, Display Contract §Formats]
- [x] CHK008 Is Timer-mode epoch display clearly defined as elapsed milliseconds from zero rather than a wall-clock Unix timestamp? [Clarity, Spec §FR-006, Spec §Assumptions]
- [x] CHK009 Is left-zero-padding for Timer-mode epoch display specified clearly enough to derive values such as `0000000000000` and `0000000012345`? [Clarity, Spec §FR-006, Quickstart §Expected Examples]
- [x] CHK010 Is "display preference only" defined with a complete list of state that must not change? [Clarity, Spec §FR-003]
- [x] CHK011 Is "current format" for input event capture tied to event acceptance time, not later rendering or file writing? [Clarity, Spec §FR-010, Logging Contract §Capture-Time Timestamp Rule]
- [x] CHK012 Is the `Epoch Toggle` icon direction specific enough to guide design without requiring additional clarification? [Clarity, Spec §FR-018, UI Contract §Icon Contract]
- [x] CHK013 Are tooltip and accessibility label requirements specific about whether they describe current state, target action, or both? [Clarity, Spec §FR-019, UI Contract §Accessibility Contract]

## Requirement Consistency

- [x] CHK014 Are format names consistent across spec, plan, data model, contracts, quickstart, and tasks? [Consistency, Spec §FR-001, Plan §Design Notes, Data Model §TimeFormatPreference]
- [x] CHK015 Are Clock and Timer format requirements aligned between the spec and display contract without conflicting examples? [Consistency, Spec §FR-005, Spec §FR-006, Display Contract §Formats]
- [x] CHK016 Are logging preservation requirements aligned between the spec, logging contract, and tasks without implying reformatting of old rows? [Consistency, Spec §FR-010, Spec §FR-011, Logging Contract §Visible Table Contract]
- [x] CHK017 Are overlay size requirements aligned between spec, plan, UI contract, and tasks without allowing default size growth? [Consistency, Spec §FR-016, Plan §Design Notes, UI Contract §Layout Contract]
- [x] CHK018 Are input logging privacy boundaries consistent with the feature's timestamp-only scope? [Consistency, Spec §Assumptions, Logging Contract §Privacy Contract]

## Acceptance Criteria Quality

- [x] CHK019 Are success criteria quantified for format-switch responsiveness, timer accuracy, logging preservation, layout fit, and visual review? [Acceptance Criteria, Spec §SC-001..SC-006]
- [x] CHK020 Can the "no pause, reset, or restart" timer requirement be objectively evaluated from the written criteria? [Measurability, Spec §FR-007, Spec §SC-002, Spec §SC-003]
- [x] CHK021 Is the "no overlay size increase" requirement measurable with a concrete default size and affected UI states? [Measurability, Spec §FR-016, Spec §SC-005]
- [x] CHK022 Are light/dark readability requirements bounded by explicit opacity values and affected controls? [Measurability, Spec §SC-006]
- [x] CHK023 Are test-readiness requirements traceable from success criteria to task checkpoints? [Traceability, Spec §SC-007, Tasks §Phase 2, Contracts §Test Checkpoints]

## Scenario Coverage

- [x] CHK024 Are primary Clock switching scenarios covered for both directions and relaunch persistence? [Coverage, Spec §User Story 1]
- [x] CHK025 Are Timer scenarios covered for reset, running, paused, and latest Loop states? [Coverage, Spec §User Story 2]
- [x] CHK026 Are input logging scenarios covered for Clock mode, Timer mode, same-session mixed formats, and preserved rows? [Coverage, Spec §User Story 3]
- [x] CHK027 Are compact overlay UI scenarios covered for Clock mode, Timer mode, expanded logging state, light appearance, and dark appearance? [Coverage, Spec §User Story 4]
- [x] CHK028 Are alternate flows covered for repeated format switching and system clock changes? [Coverage, Spec §Edge Cases]

## Edge Case Coverage

- [x] CHK029 Are requirements defined for corrupted, missing, or unknown persisted time format values? [Edge Case, Spec §FR-004, Spec §Edge Cases]
- [x] CHK030 Are requirements defined for events captured close to the moment of a format switch? [Edge Case, Spec §Edge Cases, Logging Contract §Capture-Time Timestamp Rule]
- [x] CHK031 Are requirements defined for minimum supported overlay size without hiding the new toggle? [Edge Case, Spec §Edge Cases]
- [x] CHK032 Are mixed-format log files explicitly permitted and bounded by line-level timestamp preservation rules? [Edge Case, Spec §Edge Cases, Logging Contract §Session Log File Contract]

## Non-Functional Requirements

- [x] CHK033 Are performance requirements documented without implying new busy-wait loops or extra background work? [Non-Functional, Plan §Technical Context]
- [x] CHK034 Are accessibility requirements documented for the new toggle and compacted controls, including stable identifiers and labels? [Non-Functional, Spec §FR-019, UI Contract §Accessibility Contract]
- [x] CHK035 Are visual design requirements for the new icon specific enough for light/dark adaptive styling and compact toolbar use? [Non-Functional, Spec §FR-018, UI Contract §Icon Contract]
- [x] CHK036 Are privacy requirements documented to prevent the formatting feature from expanding input logging data scope? [Non-Functional, Logging Contract §Privacy Contract]

## Dependencies & Assumptions

- [x] CHK037 Are assumptions about Timer mode being an elapsed stopwatch explicitly documented and reflected in all dependent requirements? [Assumption, Spec §Assumptions, Research §Timer Mode]
- [x] CHK038 Are dependencies on existing preferences, formatter, overlay, timer, and input logging paths documented without introducing new unapproved dependencies? [Dependency, Plan §Technical Context, Plan §Structure Decision]
- [x] CHK039 Are task dependencies ordered so shared format preference and formatter requirements precede user story-specific requirements? [Dependency, Tasks §Dependencies & Execution Order]
- [x] CHK040 Are any intentionally excluded areas, such as changing log file names or adding network sync, documented clearly enough to prevent scope creep? [Scope Boundary, Spec §FR-013, Spec §Assumptions]

## Ambiguities & Conflicts

- [x] CHK041 Is there any remaining ambiguity between "Unix timestamp", "epoch milliseconds", and "elapsed milliseconds" terminology? [Ambiguity, Spec §Clarifications, Data Model §TimeFormatter]
- [x] CHK042 Are UI grouping rules for input logging and mode switch clear if toolbar compaction changes their relative placement? [Ambiguity, UI Contract §Layout Contract]
- [x] CHK043 Are acceptance criteria and tasks aligned on whether UI mockup/artifact creation is required or only implementation plus UI tests are required? [Ambiguity, Plan §Design Notes, Tasks §US4]
- [x] CHK044 Are all requirements that use "readable", "distinguishable", or "native-feeling" backed by measurable or reviewable criteria? [Ambiguity, Spec §FR-017, Spec §FR-018, Spec §SC-006]

## Notes

- This checklist intentionally avoids implementation verification steps.
- Items marked incomplete require requirement/spec/plan/contract updates before implementation proceeds.
